title: Spontex Specialist All Purpose Cleaning Cloths, Blue (Pack of 100)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
Professional, absorbent and versatile all-purpose cloths suitable for a number of cleaning tasks
Efficient, professional, high quality cloths meaning they are great for business use
Ideal for washing up and wiping down all types of surfaces
Can be used wet or dry, to suit your needs
description: From the manufacturer Efficient Professional Cleaning Products Spontex Specialist is a full range of professional, high quality cleaning products developed specifically for small businesses such as B&B’s, hotels, cafes, hairdressers and other retail outlets.​ ​ The range also includes decorating sponges, which are made from super absorbent cellulose, making them perfect for all decorating tasks and large surface cleaning. Spontex Specialist Blue All Purpose Cloths (Pack of 50)​ Professional All Purpose Cloths Professional, absorbent and versatile, Spontex Specialist All Purpose Cloths are suitable for a variety of cleaning tasks including washing up, wiping down and mopping up spills.​ Rinse thoroughly before and after each use. Do not bleach.​ Cloth size: 30 x 35 cm​ Composition: 70% Viscose, 30% Polyester Absorbent Strong cloths Versatile​ Can be used wet or dry Ideal for numerous cleaning tasks Discover Spontex Specialist Efficient professional cloths, scourers, gloves and decorating sponges designed to cater for all business cleaning needs...
